settings.title: Application Rates
settings.application_rates: Garden beds: 1–2 tsp per gallon of water|Containers & pots: ½ tsp per gallon|Lawn application: 2 tsp per gallon, diluted|Seedling trays: ¼ tsp per gallon
settings.notes: Apply every 2–4 weeks during active growing season. Reduce to monthly during dormancy.

settings.title: Guaranteed Analysis
settings.rows: Magnesium (as Mg), 50 mg, 12%|Iron (as Fe), 18 mg, 100%|Zinc (as Zn), 11 mg, 100%|Copper (as Cu), 0.9 mg, 100%|Manganese (as Mn), 2.3 mg, 100%|Boron (as B), 1 mg, *

settings.title: Storage & Handling
settings.content: Store in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight. Keep sealed when not in use. Shelf life is 24 months from manufacture date when stored correctly.

settings.title: Safety Information
settings.content: Flora Bella is derived from naturally occurring mineral deposits and is safe for use in organic growing systems. Not intended for human or animal consumption. Keep out of reach of children. In case of eye contact, rinse thoroughly with water.

settings.heading: Application Guide & Technical Documentation
settings.subheading: Everything you need to apply Flora Bella correctly and confidently
